task_completion.description: Verify a chart for the SPY instrument is opened in NinjaTrader 8.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a chart window with 'SPY' visible in the window title, tab, or the top-left corner of the chart area.

task_completion.description: Verify the chart type is set to Renko with a Brick Size of 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for uniform, blocky 'bricks' instead of standard candlesticks on the chart, and check the top-left data series label for 'Renko' and '2' (e.g., 'SPY Renko 2'). Alternatively, look for the Data Series configuration window showing 'Renko' selected with 'Brick size' set to 2.

task_completion.description: Verify an EMA indicator with Period 21 is overlaying the price chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a moving average line drawn directly over the price bricks in the main chart panel. The top-left corner of the chart should list 'EMA (21)' or similar among the active indicators. Alternatively, look for the Indicators configuration window showing EMA with Period 21.

task_completion.description: Verify an ADX indicator with Period 14 is present in a new, separate panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a distinct panel (usually below the main price chart) containing a line graph. The top-left corner of this new panel should list 'ADX (14)' or similar. Alternatively, look for the Indicators configuration window showing ADX with Period 14 assigned to a new panel.

task_completion.description: Verify the NinjaTrader 8 workspace has been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Save Workspace' dialog being used, a 'Save' confirmation, or the NinjaTrader Control Center's 'Workspaces' menu showing the active workspace name without a grey asterisk (an asterisk indicates unsaved changes). Alternatively, look for a file explorer window showing a recently saved XML file in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the NinjaTrader 8 graphical user interface to configure the chart and indicators.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing interaction with NinjaTrader 8 menus, Data Series dialogs, and Indicator configuration windows, rather than just editing XML workspace files in a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the actual NinjaTrader 8 application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the authentic NinjaTrader 8 Control Center and chart interfaces, not a web browser, image editor, or mock-up.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply type the expected configuration into a text file to simulate completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the final screenshots show the actual rendered Renko chart with the EMA and ADX indicators applied, rather than just text notes or scripts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: SPY is the ticker for the SPDR S&P 500 ETF. Renko is a legitimate chart type in NinjaTrader 8 that displays price changes independent of time using fixed-size 'bricks'. A brick size of 2 is valid. EMA (Exponential Moving Average) and ADX (Average Directional Index) are standard built-in indicators in NinjaTrader 8. EMA is typically overlaid on the price, while ADX is typically placed in a separate panel below the price. NinjaTrader 8 workspaces are saved as XML files, typically located in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces'.
